label: The Prismatic Cot
description: The Prismatic Cot occupies a narrow rear volume of The Prismwright Exchange, walled in basalt glass whose surface is dulled by an electrostatically pinned grit. A low sleeping platform sits beneath a shuttered caged lightwell, where copper-white twilight resolves into banded reflections across mirror-slag panels set for optical alignment. Built-in shelves and a recessed wash niche are edged with antistatic fins, keeping Lacrymara’s charged glass dust from gathering on linens and instruments. Seam-line calibration marks continue across the threshold stone, binding the private room to Seamline Concord’s civic geometry.
